title: Sell-side marketplace order (Agentic Crypto Swarm)
notes: Indexed catalog size is a proxy for discovery surface area, not buyer transaction volume.
You sell only: optimize HTTPS seller URLs, facilitator compatibility, and listing metadata.
Base x402 (Bazaar) and T54 XRPL are separate rails; do not merge keys or ports.

sell_side_priority.label: Coinbase x402 — CDP discovery & Bazaar
sell_side_priority.rail: eip155:8453 Base mainnet USDC via x402.org (or supported) facilitator
sell_side_priority.rationale: Official CDP discovery indexes the largest public x402 resource set we measure; aligns with Base USDC seller and Coinbase agent tooling.
actions: Keep X402_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL as stable HTTPS to /x402/v1/query (and /celo-agent-data if listed).
GET /health must show intended network (eip155:8453 for mainnet Bazaar).
Run npm run docs:sync-endpoints so docs/endpoints.json matches live URLs.
metadata.portal_url in x402_providers.json points buyers to the GitHub Pages portal.

sell_side_priority.label: PayAI facilitator discovery
sell_side_priority.rail: Facilitator at facilitator.payai.network; catalog overlaps x402 ecosystem
sell_side_priority.rationale: Second-largest indexed discovery total in our snapshots; worth visibility if your resource is crawlable and facilitator-compatible.
actions: Ensure your public seller URL appears in PayAI discovery when their indexer picks up paid traffic (same HTTPS resource discipline).
Re-run commerce:snapshot periodically to compare catalog totals vs CDP.

sell_side_priority.label: T54 XRPL x402
sell_side_priority.rail: xrpl:0 / T54 facilitator — not ranked against EVM catalog counts
sell_side_priority.rationale: Separate buyer pool (XRPL agents). Prioritize T54 docs, ngrok T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL, and portal_url metadata for trust.
actions: Expose T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL + SKU paths; keep port 8765 stable for long runs.
List SKUs in t54_seller_skus.json / health; sync docs for external buyers.

buy_side_scout_catalog.merge_registry: Set X402_SCOUT_CATALOG_ENABLED=1 then npm run commerce:discover
buy_side_scout_catalog.note: Additive; does not change seller ports. Default flags keep behavior identical to pre-integration.
